title: G2PLUS Brown Gift Tags with Heart: 50PCS Blank Paper Tags with String, 4.5cm x 9.5cm Large Gift Labels for Wedding Favors, Presents, 300g/m²
features: 【Sturdy Material】The favor tags are made of 300 (GSM) High Quality Card Paper. The paper is sufficiently stable and thick.
【Enough Jute String】The cord is 1.5mm x 10m. The cord is sturdy and long enough to attach lots and lots of pendants.

【Good Quality】The little hearts are pre cut and easy removed so you just pop out the middle leaving the heart shape and you will get a ton of teeny cute card hearts and the cards are not frayed,. the little hearts can be used as table confetti and other craft decorations.
【Nice Touch for Labelling Gifts】Really nice tags with string which can be used for any purpose really, gives parcels and gifts a really rustic homemade feel. Perfect as favour tags for your wedding.

【Nice for Homemade Craft】 You can use these to print your designs onto these tags to personalise your tags. Perfect for clothing tags, price tags, gift tags, student words cards, bookmarks tags, wedding favor tags, wish.
